user.title: Set up zencontrol
user.description: Discover controllers on your network via multicast, or enter connection details manually. Controllers need a TPI Advanced license.

manual.title: Connect to zencontrol controller
manual.description: Enter the details for your zencontrol application controller. Note that the controller must have a TPI Advanced license attached.

data.label: Controller name
data.unicast: Use unicast events (not recommended - only use if broadcast packets are unsupported by your network topology)
data.abort_manual: Enable this and press Submit to abort manual data entry

data_description.mac: Leave blank and submit to look up from the host IP (same subnet only). Confirm the value, then submit again.

select_discovered.title: Select controllers
select_discovered.description: These controllers were found via multicast. Select one or more to add.

discovery_failed.title: Couldn’t add a controller
discovery_failed.description: No additional controller was added. You can try discovery again, enter details manually, or continue with the controllers already configured.

confirm_discovery.title: Confirm zencontrol controller
confirm_discovery.description: Found **{label}** at `{host}` (MAC `{mac}`). Do you want to add it?

add_another.title: Add another controller
add_another.description: Configure an additional zencontrol application controller for this integration.

data.label: Controller name
data.abort_manual: Enable this and press Submit to abort manual data entry

data_description.mac: Leave blank and submit to look up from the host IP (same subnet only). Confirm the value, then submit again.

add_more.title: Add more controllers?
add_more.description: You can discover or manually add another controller now, or finish setup. After finishing you can create sub-devices to assign rooms.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure zencontrol
reconfigure.description: Choose a controller to edit, or change unicast settings.

reconfigure_controller.title: Reconfigure controller
reconfigure_controller.description: Update connection settings for this zencontrol application controller.

data_description.mac: Leave blank and submit to look up from the host IP (same subnet only). Confirm the value, then submit again.

unicast_settings.title: Unicast settings
unicast_settings.description: Unicast is shared by all controllers in this integration.

data.unicast: Use unicast events (not recommended - only use if broadcast packets are unsupported by your network topology)

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the controller. Check the host/port and try again.
error.invalid_mac: Invalid MAC address format. Use XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX.
error.invalid_host: Host is required when adding a controller.
error.mac_not_found: Could not discover a MAC address for that host. Enter it manually (same subnet required for lookup).
error.duplicate_mac: A controller with this MAC address is already configured.

abort.already_configured: This zencontrol application controller is already configured.
abort.no_devices_found: No zencontrol controllers were found on the network. Try again or enter details manually.
abort.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the discovered controller.

progress.listen: Listening for zencontrol controllers on the network… Push a wall button to emit a discoverable packet.
progress.setup_devices: Discovering all lights and devices on your controllers…

init.title: Manage zencontrol
init.description: Select a controller to manage, or add another.

controller.title: Manage controller
controller.description:
### {controller}

Sub-devices let you split some of this controller's entities onto a virtual child device, so you can assign them a room in Home Assistant.

add_controller.title: Add controller
add_controller.description: Enter the details for an additional zencontrol application controller.

data_description.mac: Leave blank and submit to look up from the host IP (same subnet only). Confirm the value, then submit again.

discovery_failed.title: No controllers found
discovery_failed.description: No zencontrol controllers were found on the network via multicast. You can try again or enter details manually.

add_discovered.title: Add discovered controllers
add_discovered.description: Select one or more controllers found via multicast on your network.

remove_controller.title: Remove controller
remove_controller.description: Remove {controller}? At least one controller must remain.

suggest_sub_devices.title: Set up sub-devices?
suggest_sub_devices.description:
### {controller}

Sub-devices group entities by label prefix so you can assign them to a room. You can skip this and add them later from Configure.

add_sub_device.title: Add sub-device
add_sub_device.description: Define a sub-device for {controller}. Enter comma-separated label prefixes. The first name becomes the device name. Example: Kitchen,Living,Lounge,Entrance

data_description.prefixes: Case-insensitive. Comma delimited. Matches labels that start with any of these strings.
data_description.area_id: Optional. Assign this sub-device to a Home Assistant area. The integration owns this area; changes made on the Devices page are overwritten on the next sync.

reconfigure_sub_device.title: Reconfigure {sub_device}
reconfigure_sub_device.description: Update label prefixes for this sub-device on {controller}. The first name becomes the device name.

data_description.prefixes: Case-insensitive. Comma delimited. Matches labels that start with any of these strings.
data_description.area_id: Optional. Assign this sub-device to a Home Assistant area. The integration owns this area; changes made on the Devices page are overwritten on the next sync.

delete_sub_device.title: Delete sub-device
delete_sub_device.description: Delete {sub_device} from {controller}? Affected entities return to the controller device.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the controller. Check the host/port and try again.
error.invalid_host: Host is required when adding a controller.
error.invalid_mac: Invalid MAC address format. Use XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX.
error.mac_not_found: Could not discover a MAC address for that host. Enter it manually (same subnet required for lookup).
error.duplicate_mac: A controller with this MAC address is already configured.
error.empty_prefixes: Enter at least one label prefix.
error.duplicate_prefix: That prefix is already used by another sub-device on this controller.

abort.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the controller. Check the host/port and try again.

progress.listen: Listening for zencontrol controllers on the network… Push a wall button to emit a discoverable packet.
progress.setup_devices: Mapping all entities on your controllers…
